2605.05811.title: Sheet as Token: A Graph-Enhanced Representation for Multi-Sheet Spreadsheet Understanding
2605.05811.paper_summary: Workbook-scale spreadsheet understanding is increasingly important for language-model-based data analysis agents, but remains challenging because relevant information is often distributed across multiple sheets with heterogeneous schemas, layouts, and implicit relationships. Existing retrieval-augmented approaches typically decompose spreadsheets into rows, columns, or blocks to improve scalability; however, such chunk-centric representations can fragment worksheets into isolated text spans and weaken global sheet-level semantics. We propose Sheet as Token, a graph-enhanced framework that treats each worksheet as a unified semantic unit for multi-sheet spreadsheet retrieval. Our method extracts schema-aware records from sheet names, column headers, representative values, and layout features, and encodes each worksheet into a compact dense token. Given a natural-language query, a Graph Retriever constructs a query-specific candidate graph over sheet tokens using semantic, query-conditioned, schema-consistency, and shape-compatibility relations, and composes these channels through a multi-stage graph transformer to retrieve supporting sheet sets. Experiments on a constructed multi-sheet spreadsheet corpus show that sheet-level tokenization learns stable representations, and that graph-enhanced cross-sheet reasoning improves listwise retrieval over a shallow graph baseline with limited additional graph-side computation. These results suggest that sheet-level tokenization is a promising abstraction for scalable multi-sheet spreadsheet understanding.
2605.05811.paper_summary_zh: 工作簿規模的電子表格理解對於基於語言模型的數據分析代理越來越重要，但仍然具有挑戰性，因為相關信息通常分佈在多個具有異質架構、佈局和隱含關係的工作表中。現有的檢索增強方法通常將電子表格分解為行、列或區塊以提高可擴展性；然而，這種以塊為中心的表示可能會將工作表碎片化為孤立的文本片段，並削弱全局工作表級別的語義。我們提出了“工作表作為標記”（Sheet as Token），這是一個增強圖形的框架，將每個工作表視為多工作表電子表格檢索的統一語義單元。我們的方法從工作表名稱、列標題、代表性值和佈局特徵中提取具備架構意識的記錄，並將每個工作表編碼為一個緊湊的密集標記。給定自然語言查詢，圖形檢索器基於語義、查詢條件、架構一致性和形狀兼容性關係，構建一個查詢特定的候選圖形，並通過多階段圖形變換器組合這些通道以檢索支持的工作表集。對構建的多工作表電子表格語料庫的實驗表明，工作表級別的標記化學習穩定的表示，並且增強圖形的跨工作表推理在有限的額外圖形側計算下改善了基於淺圖形基線的列表檢索。這些結果表明，工作表級別的標記化是一種有前景的抽象，適用於可擴展的多工作表電子表格理解。
2605.05811.author: Yiming Lei et.al.
2605.05811.authors: Yiming Lei, Yiqi Wang, Yujia Zhang, Bo Guan, Depei Zhu, Chunhui Wang, Zhuonan Hao, Tianyu Shi
